title: Reviver Bitter Moroccan Delight
description: A refreshing twist on traditional Moroccan flavors, featuring reviver's invigorating essence and the bitter notes of dark chocolate.
instructions: Combine tea, chocolate, and reviver in a saucepan and heat over low heat.
Bring mixture to a simmer and whisk until chocolate is melted.
Stir in orange marmalade, mint, honey, lemon juice, cinnamon, and ginger.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
